summary: Mortar routing table missing 4 Mode values (code_audit, correctness, quality, subprocess) — silently falls back to quantitative-analyst
question-designer-bl2 uses Operational Mode field and CamelCase values; Mortar reads Mode field with lowercase — incompatible, plus 5 of 9 modes have no route
All 5 missing BL 2.0 specialist agents exist in template but are unreachable — pure routing table gap, no frontier-analyst.md exists
code_audit Mode in bl2 is a Python runner type flag, not Mortar routing — no archive corruption found; risk is latent
Mortar has no startup Mode validation — routing failures discovered only at question dispatch time, no pre-flight catch
Mortar research routing ambiguous (regulatory vs competitive) but recoverable from agent descriptions; Low severity
Double field mismatch: **Method** vs **Agent**, plus frontier-analyst phantom reference — 100% of q-d-bl2 questions fail Mortar routing
No master question schema doc exists — three mismatches share common root cause: question-designer-bl2 and mortar developed independently without shared interface contract
research-analyst has no Frontier-mode instructions; epistemologically incompatible — no frontier-analyst.md exists in fleet
All 10 agents in program.md have .md files; but agent-meta lacks .claude/agents/ directory — relative path resolution fails
Planner writes CAMPAIGN_PLAN.md but neither question-designer nor Mortar reads it — interface severed, domain prioritization wasted
Fix Specification field names differ (Target file/Concrete edit vs File/Change); code-reviewer also reads original finding, not _fix.md artifact
Grep pattern matches correctly; but OVERRIDE not cleared after handling causes infinite re-queue loop; timing gap allows 9 contaminated downstream findings
Thresholds match (0.80); but definitive whitelist excludes APPROVED/CONFIRMED/FLEET_COMPLETE — code-reviewer/peer-reviewer/forge-check all score UNDERPERFORMING incorrectly
Hypothesis arithmetic wrong (55<60=FAILING); real gap: hollow section headers bypass -30 pts of checks, scoring broken stub agents as WARNING not FAILING
NEEDS_REVISION/BLOCKED criteria clear; three soft gaps: no coverage tool, LLM-only regression detection, 2-cycle limit not tracked by code-reviewer
Session-local counter resets on resume; sentinels never fire if < 5 questions remain on resume; correction depends on Recall retrieval quality
_fix.md suffix causes silent re-queue failure; spurious OVERRIDE match if specialist misuses OVERRIDE; no handled-marker causes double re-queue
Tag namespacing works correctly; each agent's self-queries retrieve correct stores; only minor gap is planner's broad query and project name substitution
Mortar says "validate structure" but no validation logic defined; empty/malformed findings create ghost DONE entries; peer-reviewer mitigates with INCONCLUSIVE
No retry limit in Mortar or peer-reviewer; NEVER STOP + unresolved OVERRIDE = genuine infinite loop; relies on LLM non-determinism as de facto limit
Neither QUICKSTART.md nor CLAUDE.md mentions planner; planner is doubly dead — output unconsumed and existence undocumented
hypothesis-generator uses domain "{project}-autoresearch" vs all other BL2.0 agents using "{project}-bricklayer" — all Recall queries return empty
overseer.md exists but requires agent_db.json (not written by any agent); not in Mortar sentinel table; not in REQUIRED_AGENTS; escalations silently dropped
100% silent misrouting to quantitative-analyst; user sees plausible findings with wrong methodology; no error log written to file
